---
title: "S1 — Course Introduction"
sidebar: slides
---


[ [Download](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1r_iXt6jHR1MF3HnuEy46vk0VYxblMiwx2xyHlQrnPeU/edit?usp=sharing) ]

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vRTDsDbCPiE15Xrojo-dQo9LjzYgQbv78pbzIhW5z_gODnTntVU1KRNEbyy7rJxKysqExfeZ1C-X53S/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
